message:
feat: add Default Container configuration section to settings modal

Implements comprehensive default container configuration following TDD:

Default Container Section:
- Container Image: Text field for any custom image (any registry supported)
- Check for updates: Toggle for automatic version checking
- Auto-pull updates: Toggle for automatic downloading
- Check frequency: Select dropdown (6h, 12h, 24h, 48h, weekly)

Text Field Support:
- Add "text" fieldType support to SettingsField
- Text field rendering with italic styling
- Ready for future text input editing capabilities
- Consistent fixed-width layout like other field types

Frequency Management:
- formatFrequencyForDisplay() converts hours to human format (24 → "24h")
- parseFrequencyFromDisplay() converts back for config ("24h" → 24)
- Support standard intervals plus weekly (168h)

Config Integration:
- Update applyModalConfigUpdates() to handle DefaultContainer fields
- Safe config updating preserves unshown settings
- Comprehensive test coverage for all new functionality

Expected Layout:
```
Default Container
    Container Image                    ghcr.io/obra/packnplay-default:latest
    Default container image to use (supports any registry)

    Check for updates                  ON
    Automatically check registry for new image versions

    Auto-pull updates                  OFF
    Automatically download new versions when found

    Check frequency                    24h
    How often to check for updates
```

This enables users to:
- Use any container as their default (company images, custom builds, etc.)
- Control update checking behavior with fine-grained preferences
- Set custom check frequencies based on their workflow needs

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
